message:
fix(service): fail-closed repoll guards, FilterFuture encapsulation, and Steer invalid-route handling

FilterFuture: Convert from a bare enum to a struct wrapping a private
FilterFutureState enum with a Done variant. After poll returns Ready,
state transitions to Done and subsequent polls return
FilterError::PolledAfterCompletion instead of re-executing terminal
logic. Add constructors (not_ready, inner, rejected) to replace direct
enum variant construction. Add regression tests for all three terminal
paths.

Steer: Remove the silent modulo-wrap of out-of-range picker indexes
(idx % len) which silently routed to the wrong backend. Replace with
an explicit bounds check that returns SteerError::InvalidRoute
containing the invalid index and service count, with a test verifying
no backend receives the request. Add repoll-after-InvalidRoute test.

ConcurrencyLimit: rustfmt assert_with_log macro invocation.
RateLimit: rustfmt long type annotation.
Reconnect: rustfmt single-line Done arm.
combinator/rate_limit.rs: rustfmt match arms and method chains.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
